!! Rybbit Analytics for TiddlyWiki

Inject the [[Rybbit|https://rybbit.io]] open-source analytics script into your TiddlyWiki. Supports both self-hosted and cloud instances.

---

!!! Quick Start

# Go to ''Control Panel → Plugins → Rybbit Analytics → Settings''
# Set ''Script URL'' to your Rybbit instance, e.g. `https://analytics.example.com/api/script.js`
# Set ''Site ID'' to the hex ID shown in your Rybbit dashboard snippet
# Toggle ''Enable Tracking'' to `yes`
# Reload the wiki

---

!!! Automatic Features (no configuration needed)

When ''Enable Tracking'' is on:

* ''Pageview on load'' — fires once when the wiki boots
* ''TiddlyWiki navigation tracking'' (enabled by ''TiddlyWiki Navigation Tracking'' toggle, default ON) — fires an accurate `tiddler-view` custom event every time the user opens a tiddler, and a `pageview` on in-wiki navigation. This is more precise than generic SPA hash-change tracking because TiddlyWiki can have multiple tiddlers open simultaneously.
* ''Button text click tracking'' — all `<button>`, `role="button"`, submit, and button inputs emit a `button-click` custom event with the visible button text and current tiddler title.

---

!!! Widgets

!!!! `<$rybbit-event>` — custom event (action widget)

Use inside `<$button>` or any action sequence to track interactions.

|Attribute|Type|Description|
|`name`|string|''Required.'' Event name as shown in Rybbit|
|`properties`|JSON string|Optional extra properties object|

''Example:''

```
<$button>
  Donate Gold
  <$rybbit-event name="donate-click" properties='{"tier":"gold"}'/>
</$button>
```

!!!! `<$rybbit-view>` — impression tracking (render widget)

Fires once when the widget is rendered. Use to track tiddler impressions / section views.

|Attribute|Type|Description|
|`event`|string|Event name. Default: `tiddler-view`|
|`tiddler`|string|Tiddler name attached to event. Default: `<<currentTiddler>>`|
|`properties`|JSON string|Optional extra properties|

''Example — track every tiddler that appears in story river:''

```
\widget $rybbit-auto-track()
  <$rybbit-view tiddler=<<currentTiddler>>/>
\end
```

Put `<<$rybbit-auto-track>>` at the top of a ViewTemplate tiddler to auto-track all tiddler views.

!!!! `<$rybbit-identify>` — user identity (action widget)

Associate the current session with a named user after login.

|Attribute|Type|Description|
|`user-id`|string|''Required'' (unless `clear`). Stable user identifier|
|`traits`|JSON string|Optional user properties (name, email, plan…)|
|`clear`|flag|Present → clear identity (use on logout)|

''Login:''

```
<$rybbit-identify user-id=<<currentUser>> traits='{"plan":"pro"}'/>
```

''Logout:''

```
<$rybbit-identify clear/>
```

---

!!! Skip Patterns

The ''Skip Patterns'' field accepts a JSON array of glob/regex path patterns.  
Matching tiddler paths will not be tracked.

```json
["/admin/**", "/drafts/**", "re:^/private"]
```

---

!!! Self-hosted Setup

# Deploy [[Rybbit|https://github.com/rybbit-io/rybbit]] with Docker
# Add your domain to `BETTER_AUTH_TRUSTED_ORIGINS` in `.env`
# Point ''Script URL'' to `https://your-domain.com/api/script.js`

Inject the Rybbit script on page load (requires reload)"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/ScriptUrl/Caption":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/ScriptUrl/Caption","text":"Script URL"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/ScriptUrl/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/ScriptUrl/Description","text":"Full URL to the Rybbit script.js. The default points to analytics.tidgi.fun and can be shared across multiple tracked sites on the same Rybbit instance."},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SiteId/Caption":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SiteId/Caption","text":"Site ID"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SiteId/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SiteId/Description","text":"Hex site ID from your Rybbit dashboard snippet, for example 70f361fe5d31"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SkipPatterns/Caption":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SkipPatterns/Caption","text":"Skip Patterns"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SkipPatterns/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/SkipPatterns/Description","text":"JSON array of URL path patterns to ignore, e.g. ["/admin/**"]"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/NavigationTracking/Caption":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/NavigationTracking/Caption","text":"TiddlyWiki Navigation Tracking"},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/NavigationTracking/Description":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/en-GB/Configs/NavigationTracking/Description","text":"Fire a pageview + tiddler-open event each time the user navigates to a tiddler. Recommended — more accurate than default SPA tracking."},"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/zh-Hans/Readme":{"title":"$:/plugins/linonetwo/rybbit-analytics/language/zh-Hans/Readme","text":"!! TiddlyWiki Rybbit 统计分析插件

将 [[Rybbit|https://rybbit.io]] 开源统计脚本注入 TiddlyWiki，支持自托管和官方云服务实例。

---

!!! 快速开始

# 进入''控制面板 → 插件 → Rybbit Analytics → 设置''
# 将''脚本地址''设置为你的 Rybbit 实例，例如 `https://analytics.example.com/api/script.js`
# 将''站点 ID''设置为 Rybbit 后台代码片段中显示的十六进制 ID
# 将''启用追踪''切换为 `yes`
# 重新加载 Wiki

---

!!! 自动功能（无需额外配置）

开启''启用追踪''后：

* ''加载时上报 Pageview'' — Wiki 启动时自动触发一次
* ''TiddlyWiki 导航追踪''（由''TiddlyWiki 导航追踪''开关控制，默认开启）— 每次用户打开 tiddler 时将当前 hash 作为真实页面路径触发 `pageview`。比通用 SPA hash 追踪更准确，因为 TiddlyWiki 可同时展开多个 tiddler。
* ''按钮文本点击追踪'' — 所有 `<button>`、`role="button"`、提交按钮和按钮输入框默认触发 `button-click` 自定义事件，并附带按钮可见文本和当前 tiddler 标题。
* ''下载链接追踪'' — 指向 `/files/` 或常见二进制安装包后缀的链接默认触发 `download-click` 自定义事件，并附带链接文本、文件路径和当前 tiddler 标题。

---

!!! Widgets

!!!! `<$rybbit-event>` — 自定义事件（Action Widget）

放在 `<$button>` 或任意 action 序列中，追踪用户交互。

|属性|类型|说明|
|`name`|字符串|''必填。'' Rybbit 中显示的事件名|
|`properties`|JSON 字符串|可选的额外属性对象|

''示例：''

```
<$button>
  捐赠黄金版
  <$rybbit-event name="donate-click" properties='{"tier":"gold"}'/>
</$button>
```

!!!! `<$rybbit-view>` — 曝光追踪（渲染 Widget）

Widget 渲染时触发一次事件，用于追踪 tiddler 曝光或章节浏览。

|属性|类型|说明|
|`event`|字符串|事件名，默认：`tiddler-view`|
|`tiddler`|字符串|附加到事件的 tiddler 名，默认：`<<currentTiddler>>`|
|`properties`|JSON 字符串|可选额外属性|

''示例 — 追踪所有在 story river 中出现的 tiddler：''

```
\widget $rybbit-auto-track()
  <$rybbit-view tiddler=<<currentTiddler>>/>
\end
```

将 `<<$rybbit-auto-track>>` 放到 ViewTemplate tiddler 顶部，即可自动追踪所有 tiddler 浏览。

!!!! `<$rybbit-identify>` — 用户身份（Action Widget）

登录后将当前会话与具名用户关联。

|属性|类型|说明|
|`user-id`|字符串|''必填''（除非使用 `clear`）。稳定的用户唯一标识|
|`traits`|JSON 字符串|可选用户属性（name、email、plan 等）|
|`clear`|标志属性|存在时 → 清除身份（用于登出）|

''登录时：''

```
<$rybbit-identify user-id=<<currentUser>> traits='{"plan":"pro"}'/>
```

''登出时：''

```
<$rybbit-identify clear/>
```

---

!!! 跳过规则

''跳过规则''字段接受 glob 或正则路径模式的 JSON 数组，匹配的 tiddler 路径不会被追踪。

```json
["/admin/**", "/drafts/**", "re:^/private"]
```

---

!!! 自托管部署

# 用 Docker 部署 [[Rybbit|https://github.com/rybbit-io/rybbit]]
# 在 `.env` 中将你的域名加入 `BETTER_AUTH_TRUSTED_ORIGINS`
# 将''脚本地址''指向 `https://your-domain.com/api/script.js`
